_comment: Single source of truth for the /integrations page list AND the IntegrationsGrid hero card. §83 expansion: matched the named-logo coverage of the top-5 BGC competitors (24 partners — adds Paychex, UKG, Rippling, Gusto, Oracle HCM, Ceridian Dayforce, Recruitee, SmartRecruiters, Zoho Recruit, Personio, Namely, HiBob).

items.name: Greenhouse
items.body: Auto-trigger packages on stage move; report PDF attached to candidate profile.

items.name: Lever
items.body: Two-way sync of background check status, requisition + offer stages.

items.name: Workday
items.body: Pre-hire screening with Workday Recruiting and Onboarding workflows.

items.name: BambooHR
items.body: New-hire automation: kick off MVR + drug screen at offer acceptance.

items.name: Bullhorn
items.body: Native panel for staffing teams; bulk-order packages from a tearsheet.

items.name: Workable
items.body: One-click background check from candidate profile, results in-app.

items.name: JazzHR
items.body: Trigger checks at any pipeline stage and send candidate-facing forms.

items.name: iCIMS
items.body: Marketplace integration; full bi-directional status + report sync.

items.name: SmartRecruiters
items.body: Talent CRM + ATS; trigger background screening from candidate hiring stages.

items.name: Recruitee
items.body: Collaborative hiring platform; pre-hire checks fire at the offer stage.

items.name: Zoho Recruit
items.body: Customizable ATS for staffing and corporate hiring; write-back of report PDFs.

items.name: ADP Workforce Now
items.body: Roll background check results into your onboarding + payroll setup.

items.name: Paylocity
items.body: Run pre-hire screens and write outcomes into Paylocity onboarding.

items.name: Paychex Flex
items.body: Pre-hire screening rolls into Paychex onboarding + I-9 workflow.

items.name: Gusto
items.body: SMB favorite; one-click background check at offer acceptance.

items.name: Ceridian Dayforce
items.body: Enterprise payroll + HR; results write back into Dayforce onboarding.

items.name: SAP SuccessFactors
items.body: Enterprise-grade integration for global hiring with localized packages.

items.name: Oracle HCM Cloud
items.body: Enterprise HCM; pre-hire screening and adjudication wired into Recruiting Cloud.

items.name: UKG Pro / Ready
items.body: UKG (Ultimate Kronos Group) HCM; trigger packages from new-hire workflows.

items.name: Rippling
items.body: Modern HR/IT/finance platform; background checks part of the hire workflow.

items.name: HiBob
items.body: Pre-hire screening for global teams; multi-locale candidate consent flow.

items.name: Personio
items.body: European HR platform; GDPR-compliant background screening for EU hires.

items.name: Namely
items.body: Mid-market HR platform; pre-hire screening rolls into onboarding tasks.

items.name: Salesforce
items.body: Custom-built for staffing and BPO clients — request access from the team.
